/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/test_config_manager.dir/unit/test_config_manager.cpp.o -o test_config_manager  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../../liblevelii_BackgroundFrameFetcher.a ../../liblevelii_FrameStorageManager.a -lstdc++fs /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../../liblevelii_RadarParser.a ../../liblevelii_DecompressionUtils.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbz2.so ../../liblevelii_AWSInitializer.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-cpp-sdk-s3.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-cpp-sdk-core.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-crt-cpp.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-mqtt.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-event-stream.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-s3.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-auth.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-http.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-io.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libs2n.so.1.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-cal.so.1.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-checksums.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-compression.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-sdkutils.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-common.so.1.0.0 -ldl -lm -lrt ../../liblevelii_ThreadPool.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lpthread
